sutta: the buddha said monks endowed with these 7 qualities among is worthy of offerings is the world's peerless field for merit with what 7 monks hearing among is a dhamma nor meaning nor self nor measure nor time nor assembly nor noble or base person no and how is among dhamma here in monks among knows dhamma the discourses or sutas unless he know the discourses he should not be called a dhamma no and how is he a meaning no here in monks among knows the meaning of this and that speech such is the meaning of this speech such of that unless he know each meaning he should not be called a knower of the meaning but because he knows such is the meaning of this speech such of that therefore he is called the knower of the meaning and how is he a self-knower here in monks among those of self thus far am i in faith in virtue in learning in generosity in wisdom and in ready with unless he know this he should not be called a self-knower but because he knows of self thus far am i in faith in virtue and so forth therefore he is called a self-knower and how is he a measure noah here in monks among knows measure in accepting the requisites that is to say the rope arms lodging and medicines unless he know this he should not be called and noah of measure but because he knows measure in accepting the requisites therefore he is called the noah of measure and how is he a time nor here in monks a monk knows the time thus this is the time for recitation this for questioning this for effort this for solitude unless he know this he should not be called the time noah but because he knows the time for recitation for questioning and so forth therefore he is called a time lord and how is he an assembly noah here in monks and among those assemblies thus this is an assembly of nobles this obra means this of householders list of recluses there 1 should approach in such a way stand us sit speak and be silent so unless he knows this he should not be called a noah of assemblies but because he knows an assembly of nobles an assembly of brahmins and so forth therefore he is called the noah of assemblies and how is he a noble and based person know herein monks persons are known to among in 2 ways of 2 persons 1 desires to see the aryans the other does not this 1 who has no desire to see the aryans is to be blamed for that reason but the other because he desires to see the aryans is to be commanded of the 2 who desire to see the aryans 1 desires to hear saddam or the true dhamma the other does not the letter is to be blamed for that reason the former is to be commanded of the 2 who desire to hear saddam 1 listens to dhamma with ready ear the other does not the letter is to be blamed the former is to be commanded of 2 who listen to dhamma with ready ear 1 having heard it is mindful of dhamma the other is not the latter is to be blamed the former is to be commanded of 2 who having heard it are mindful of dhamma 1 tests the truth of the doctrines he has learned the other does not the latter is to be blamed the former is to be commended of 2 who test the truth of the doctrines learned 1 knowing the letter and the spirit walks in conformity with dhamma the other does not the letter is to be blamed the former is to be commanded of 2 persons who knowing the letter and the spirit wrong in conformity with dhamma 1 conforms for his own benefit but not for others the other conforms both for his own benefit and for the benefit of others the person who conforms for his own benefit and not for others is to be blamed for that reason the person who conforms both for his own benefit and for the benefit of others is to be commanded for that reason thus monks persons are known to among in 2 ways and thus among is a nor of noble and base persons verily monks endowed with these 7 qualities among is worthy of offerings and is the world's fearless field for marriage that's the end of the suta
commentary:
here there are 7 things but among the first 1 is means a person who knows the suttas or discourses of the buddha a meaning noah is 1 who knows the meaning of of a speech the meaning of this speech or that speech he knows a self noah is the 1 who knows of himself he has so much faith he has so much virtue so much learning generosity wisdom ready read et cetera a measure noah is a man who knows measure in accepting the requisites a time noah is a monk who knows the time whether it is a suitable time for chanting a suitable time for questioning a suitable time for making effort a suitable time for solitude etc and an assembly noah is a person who knows this type of assembly that type of assembly and he knows how to act in any particular assembly he knows how to approach how to stand how to sit how to speak or be silent and then a noble and based person noah you can see from here there's so many types of persons uh 1 desires to see the aryans 1 does not desire to see aryans and then of those who desire to see aryans 1 desires to hear the dhamma another 1 even though he goes to see the monks or the aryans he does not want to hear the dhamma and then of those who hear the dhamma 1 listens with a ready ear pays attention when he hears the dhamma the other does not and then the 1 of the 2 types of persons who hear the dharma with ready ear 1 remembers the dhamma that he has heard the other does not and then of the of the ones who remember the dhamma 1 test the truth of the dhamma he has learned he investigates the truth of the dhamma the other does not and then of those who investigate the truth of the dhamma 1 practices according to the dhamma another time do not practice even though they know the meaning they don't practice and then lastly of those who practice


===== SOURCE: 068_Anguttara Nikaya Book 7G 7765 - 7767 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====
now come to the next suta

items: means a person who knows the suttas or discourses of the buddha
meaning noah is 1 who knows the meaning of of a speech
self noah is the 1 who knows of himself
measure noah is a man who knows measure in accepting the requisites
time noah is a monk who knows the time
assembly noah is a person who knows this type of assembly
